barRaise.topFinding: Ninth consecutive daily review with zero application-code findings. HEAD has not moved since v0.18.4 (3d9b480, 2026-06-14), the working tree is clean, the 06-16 canonical audit reads "No drift", and all three version pills agree at v0.18.4. The verdict holds at needs-attention only because of three decision-shaped items that no fix will close: the 864 MB .git history, the work queue still split across three project-ID spellings, and a 98%-complete tool still on a daily lens cadence that has now gone two days with no commits. One thing drained since 06-15: the solo-dev-voice LOW closed once the generated docs/drift-fixes-*.md reports were gitignored, so em dashes no longer surface anywhere on disk. The recommendation is identical to the last four reviews and is the highest-leverage move by a wide margin: cut v1.0, make the strip-or-keep .git call, and drop Apothecary to weekly review so the cadence matches the work left. The daily pass is now reprinting the same three decisions, not finding new ones.
